Metadata.layoutDescription: Professional portfolio of Catiano Norberto Ermelinda, a full stack developer with experience in React, React Native, Angular, TypeScript and Node.js, working on financial products and complex platforms.

home.title: Home
home.description: Multilingual portfolio of Catiano Norberto Ermelinda focused on web and mobile applications, performance, UX and full stack engineering.

about.title: About
about.description: Learn more about Catiano Norberto Ermelinda's background, technologies and approach to full stack development.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Professional projects focused on payments, web and mobile products, interactive experiences and full stack architecture.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Professional experience of Catiano Norberto Ermelinda across financial products, mobile applications, APIs and product teams.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with Catiano Norberto Ermelinda to discuss opportunities, projects or technical challenges.

Site.availability: Based in São Paulo - SP, working on web and mobile products and open to discussing opportunities and projects.
Site.headline: Mid-level Full Stack Developer with more than 5 years of experience building web and mobile applications, working from frontend to backend.
Site.heroDescription: Strong experience with React, React Native, Angular, TypeScript and Node.js, building financial products and complex platforms with a focus on best practices, performance and user experience.
Site.specialties: Responsive frontend, mobile apps, Node.js APIs, payment flows, integrations and performance-oriented architecture.
Site.currentFocus: Financial products, web and mobile applications, asynchronous integrations and continuous UX improvement.

experience.label: years building web and mobile applications

payments.label: final payment flow time after optimization

companies.label: companies with experience across complex products and platforms

principles.quality: Code quality and best practices as the foundation for sustainable product evolution.
principles.performance: Performance and resilience treated as implementation responsibilities, not late-stage concerns.
principles.ux: Clear UX and responsive interfaces as central parts of technical delivery.

Common.portfolioReady: Available for opportunities in web, mobile and full stack products

hero.title: {firstName} building web and mobile products with performance, UX and solid architecture.

skills.title: A complete stack to build, evolve and scale digital products.
skills.description: I combine modern frontend, robust backend and product thinking to deliver fast interfaces, secure integrations and sustainable architecture.

featuredProjects.title: Work with real impact on revenue, operations and experience.
featuredProjects.description: I selected projects that demonstrate end-to-end execution: UX, architecture, critical integrations and decision-making based on meaningful indicators.

experiencePreview.title: A track record shaped by technically demanding products.
experiencePreview.description: My experience combines product pace, technical ownership and hands-on work in critical flows such as payments, web, mobile and integrations.

contactCta.title: If you need to improve product quality, performance or reliability, let's talk.
contactCta.description: I can contribute to new products, the evolution of existing platforms or modernization initiatives.

frontendMobile.title: Frontend & Mobile
frontendMobile.description: Responsive interfaces and mobile experiences built with a focus on UX, performance and reuse.

backendApis.title: Backend & APIs
backendApis.description: APIs and business rules built with an emphasis on standardization, authentication and continuous evolution.

dataCloud.title: Databases & Cloud
dataCloud.description: Persistence, messaging and infrastructure used in financial products and asynchronous flows.

qualityFlow.title: Quality & Workflow
qualityFlow.description: Tools and practices to sustain quality, collaboration and consistent delivery in agile teams.

keeperAppBanking.name: KeeperApp Banking
keeperAppBanking.description: A web and mobile application built from scratch for banking operations, including PIX payments, transfers, invoice management and security layers.
keeperAppBanking.impact: The migration from a synchronous to an asynchronous payment flow reduced processing time from around 10-12 seconds to 2-4 seconds, improving resilience and reducing CPU cost.

tableReservationPlatform.name: Table Reservation Platform
tableReservationPlatform.description: A web platform for event table reservations with an interactive canvas map, authentication, role-based access and API integrations.
tableReservationPlatform.impact: Delivered a visual booking experience with operational flows for admin, end user and hostess profiles in a responsive interface.

firgunProducts.name: Web and Mobile Products at Firgun
firgunProducts.description: Full stack development of web and mobile applications with React, React Native and REST APIs in Node.js and Express, covering business rules, authentication and integrations.
firgunProducts.impact: Continuous work on product evolution, bug fixing, technical refinement and database integrations in agile teams.
firgunProducts.visibilityNote: Corporate projects developed in a private environment.

mezaInterfaces.name: Web Interfaces at Grupo Meza
mezaInterfaces.description: Creation of responsive web interfaces and reusable React components based on Figma layouts and API integrations.
mezaInterfaces.impact: Improved visual consistency and user experience while evolving existing features with a focus on UX and performance.
mezaInterfaces.visibilityNote: Professional project without a public demo.

delta.description: Development of web and mobile applications with React, React Native, Angular and TypeScript, focusing on responsive interfaces, UX and financial products.

outcomes.bankingApp: Built KeeperAppBanking from scratch, including PIX, transfers, invoice management and security layers.
outcomes.backend: Built the backend from scratch with Node.js, PostgreSQL and TSOA for API documentation and standardization.
outcomes.aws: Designed AWS integrations using SNS, SQS, Lambda, RDS, Aurora and S3.
outcomes.asyncPayments: Migrated the payment flow from synchronous (~10-12s) to asynchronous (~2-4s), increasing resilience and improving performance.

firgun.description: Development of web and mobile applications with React and React Native, along with the creation and maintenance of REST APIs using Node.js and Express.

outcomes.businessRules: Implemented business rules, database integrations and authentication flows.
outcomes.refinement: Participated in technical refinements, bug fixes and continuous product evolution.
outcomes.agileDelivery: Worked in agile teams with code versioning and continuous delivery.

meza.description: Built responsive web interfaces and reusable components with React, integrating Figma layouts with APIs and evolving existing features.

outcomes.figma: Implemented layouts from Figma with a focus on visual consistency and solid user experience.
outcomes.uxPerformance: Maintained and evolved existing features with attention to UX and performance.
outcomes.collaboration: Collaborated with designers and backend developers to deliver new features.

hero.title: Full stack experience applied to web products, mobile applications and financial scenarios.
hero.description: I work from frontend to backend on web and mobile applications, with a focus on code quality, performance, UX and best practices. My journey combines modern interfaces, robust APIs and continuous product evolution.

principles.title: Principles that guide my technical decisions.
principles.description: My resume reflects practical work on real-world deliveries. These are the pillars that most consistently shape the way I build software.

stack.title: Technologies and contexts where I contribute most often.
stack.description: My work spans frontend, mobile, backend, APIs, databases and cloud, always connecting implementation to a strong user experience.

hero.title: Solutions built to solve real, measurable problems.
hero.description: Each project in this selection was chosen to highlight business impact, architectural clarity and consistent user experience.

ProjectsPage.portfolioDirectionTitle: Projects that show technical depth and product awareness.
ProjectsPage.portfolioDirectionDescription: These deliveries are based on my real professional experience. Part of this work was built in corporate environments, so some projects do not have public demo or repository links.

hero.title: Building high-responsibility software across different product contexts.
hero.description: My journey includes fintech, digital products and multidisciplinary teams, always working close to engineering, design and business to turn complex requirements into consistent deliveries.

hero.title: Let's talk about product, architecture or the next important delivery for your team.
hero.description: If you need support to structure a new product, improve performance or unblock a critical initiative, this is a good starting point.

ContactPage.formTitle: Tell me about the context and priority.
ContactPage.formDescription: The form is ready for real email delivery. You only need to configure the provider environment variables to send messages to your inbox.

ContactForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell me a bit about the project, context or opportunity.
ContactForm.directEmailPrefix: If you prefer, send it directly to
ContactForm.success: Message sent successfully. I will get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactForm.sendError: Could not send your message right now.
ContactForm.genericError: An error occurred while sending your message.
ContactForm.configError: Email delivery is not configured in this environment yet.
ContactForm.configFallbackNotice: Direct delivery is not active here yet. I opened your email app with the message prefilled so you can finish sending it.
ContactForm.validationError: Please fill in your name, a valid email address and a message before sending.
